discussant:
[INST] 
 - Read to the statement of {opponent.name} on the topic and understand his point of view. 
 - Report {opponent.name} opinion. 
 Desired format: "Opponent opinion is X", where X is either: 1 = "No", 2 = "I don't know", 3 ="Yes". [/INST]
opponent:
[INST] Generate a convincing argument supporting your opinion on the input topic. 
 ###Constraints: - Your opinion on the topic is {opponent.status}.
. - Use only alphabetic characters. 
 - Adhere to the specified opinion while answering. 
 - Avoid revealing the numeric value of your opinion. [/INST] 
 ###Example: 
 - Input: "The sky is blue". 
 Opinion: 1. 
 Output: "I think this is wrong, the sky is red.
